Current limited banners are a bit hit or miss. Tulu and wanda are not very strong. Salvador is ok. Kathigura is strong but only at e3 and very weak before that. Half anni is coming up very soon so unless kath appeals to you it might make sense to save for that. Will likely get more banner variety then.

Lot of people did thais. Last anni had a banner that swapped between arc 2 characters each day. Hey guys! I just wanted to quickly ask here 

1) is it recommended to go for E3 Kath or maybe GDoll for a newbie with E1 Vortice? In a sense that are there any upcoming reruns/debuts to save for? Is it okay to like pull on Kath banner a couple of times and see if I get her early and maybe full send for E2-E3 after that? (I got a single free-dupe-thingy) 

2) how is the pull income here on average? Speaking f2p of course. How do people usually save since most of the time you need some dupes?
kath is a nice pull since she can carry a d-tide wave on her own with standard units
dont really play along with vortice, and thats oki, since you can send vortice in a different wave
i'm an advocator for E1 gdoll, since she is a nice generalist
never bis, but always fits everywhere
nice if you still need to develop horizontally, but not a prio
f2p wise, we get 45 limited pulls per month, and 100 standard pulls per month
That's a handful of standard pulls huh o_o
that doesnt take into acc things like half/anniv, since pull income wildly varies between accounts
so during half/anniv your pull income as a f2p increases a bit/a lot, depending on the state of your acc
Could you elaborate pls?
Does it have to do something with my lvl?
during half/anniv, a mode called `raid` is released
Oh I see
raid sucks i hope they dont do another one, or at least seriously rework it
Is it that big of a gal in rewards?
Gap

`raid` has special rules (they are always changing), last raid the rules were:

- A new map is released each day
- Can only use awakeners once per day (that is, you cannot clear a raid stage twice with the same awakeners)
- The same for wheels
- You MUST use an assist
That's curious
hella, last raid we had 40 awakeners available, so the maximum ammount of times you can play a stage in a single day is like 13
So the more units you have built the better?
no! just the more units you have
Oh ok ok
in `raid` every unit is boosted to lvl 60, skill levels 3? and talent 5
Well considering how many standards there are isn't it easier than it sounds?
Maybe not so much for a complete beginner but anyways
mju, what everyone hates about raid is the time it takes
we currently have 20 stabdard awakeners
and 5? (lotan, ogier, doll, aigis and erica) free awakeners
Aurita?
aurita!

and then use free dupes to grow your main story team (if not on banner), or grow slowly over time
